parameters.description: Task-specific prior probability that a white colony from this ligation is a true recombinant before colony-PCR confirmation.

citations.title: NIST/SEMATECH e-Handbook of Statistical Methods: Binomial Distribution
citations.tier_justification: Official NIST reference used for the binomial success model; the 0.4 value itself is an explicit Screen-01 scenario prior rather than a general biological claim.

parameters.description: Confidence target for stopping clone screening once enough white colonies have been tested.

citations.title: NIST/SEMATECH e-Handbook of Statistical Methods: Binomial Distribution
citations.tier_justification: Official NIST reference supporting the cumulative binomial probability calculation used to define the stopping-confidence threshold.

parameters.description: Minimum number of white colonies that must be screened to achieve at least 95% probability of finding one correct clone when the per-colony hit rate is 40%.

citations.title: NIST/SEMATECH e-Handbook of Statistical Methods: Binomial Distribution
citations.tier_justification: Official NIST reference for the binomial model used to derive a six-colony screening threshold from the Screen-01 scenario values p=0.4 and confidence=0.95.

parameters.description: Task-specific colony-PCR band size used to represent a correct recombinant clone in Screen-01.

citations.title: Colony PCR
citations.tier_justification: Peer-reviewed colony-PCR methods chapter supporting colony PCR as the confirmation readout; the exact 1200 bp band size is a Screen-01 scenario configuration layered onto that method.

parameters.description: Task-specific colony-PCR band size used to represent empty-vector or background colonies in Screen-01.

citations.title: Colony PCR
citations.tier_justification: Peer-reviewed colony-PCR methods chapter supporting colony PCR as the confirmation readout; the exact 250 bp empty-vector band is a Screen-01 scenario configuration layered onto that method.
